data.title: UDR Declares Quarterly Dividends
data.description: UDR, Inc., a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust, has disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly dividend for the first quarter of 2026. This dividend, set at $0.435 per share, will be paid in cash on April 30, 2026, to shareholders of UDR common stock who are recorded as of April 15, 2026. Notably, this upcoming dividend on April 30 will mark UDR's 214th consecutive quarterly dividend distribution on its common stock.

data.title: Urban Edge Properties Invites You to Join Its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Urban Edge Properties extends an invitation to participate in its upcoming first quarter 2026 earnings conference call, set to take place in New York. This event will provide investors and stakeholders with insights into the company's financial performance and outlook for the future. Details regarding the specific date, time, and access information for the call will be communicated in due course. Stay tuned for key updates on Urban Edge Properties' financial results and strategic direction for the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: LTC to Participate in the Deutsche Bank Healthcare REIT Summit
data.description: In Westlake Village, California, LTC Properties Inc. (NYSE: LTC) revealed that senior management is slated to partake in the Deutsche Bank Healthcare REIT Summit on March 24, 2026, in New York. The Company's presentation materials will be accessible on the Investor Relations page of www.ltcreit.com. LTC Properties is a real estate investment trust specializing in seniors housing and health care properties, operating through SHOP.

data.title: Vesta Announces the Filing of Its Annual Report on Form 20-F for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: In Mexico City, Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: VTMX) has released its latest financial report. The company filed its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025, with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on March 17, 2026. This report, known as the 2025 Annual Report, is now available for viewing on the SEC's website at www.sec.gov or on the SEC Filings section of Vesta's investor relations website.

data.title: TechnipFMC Announces First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: TechnipFMC (FTI) is set to conduct its Q1 2026 earnings conference call on April 30, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. London time (8:30 a.m. New York time). The results will be disclosed via a press release before the call at around 11:45 a.m. London time (6:45 a.m. New York time). Interested individuals can join the live webcast through the Investor Relations website or by registration. Additionally, a replay of the webcast will be accessible later.

data.title: Trane Technologies Recognized for Outstanding Corporate Integrity and Performance by Ethisphere and Just Capital
data.description: Trane Technologies, a leading global climate innovator, has recently been acknowledged for its exceptional ethical leadership and stakeholder engagement. The company, listed on NYSE as TT, has been named one of the World’s Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere for the third year in a row. Additionally, Trane Technologies has been lauded as the best-performing company in the Construction & Materials sector in Just Capital's Best of American Business rankings. This recognition reflects the company's commitment to maintaining high ethical standards and engagement with stakeholders.

data.title: Financial results for FiscalNote in Q4 2025 and full year released.
data.description: In the latest report, it was noted that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, reaching its lowest level in the past year. This decline translates to over 300,000 new jobs being added to the economy in the last month. Additionally, the stock market experienced a significant increase, with the S&P 500 reaching a record high of 4,200 points. Experts attribute this positive trend to various factors, including increased consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing output. Overall, the economic outlook appears optimistic with steady growth projected for the upcoming quarters.

data.title: Foundation for the Development of Western Syria Hosts Congressional Briefing Marking One-Year Anniversary of Coastal Syria Massacre
data.description: In Washington, the Foundation for the Development of Western Syria held a congressional briefing in the House of Representatives to mark the one-year anniversary of the March 2025 massacre that aimed at Alawite and Christian communities in coastal Syria. The event gathered Members of Congress, congressional staff, and prominent human rights and foreign policy specialists, as well as representatives from Syria’s Alawite, Christian, Druze communities.
USTR: The US and Japan are going to identify specific beneficial critical minerals mining, processing, and manufacturing projects in the US, Japan, and other countries.
USTR: The US and Japan are going to discuss trade measures that can support a resilient critical minerals marketplace among parties to a plurilateral agreement.

data.title: Rexford Industrial Announces Dates for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: On March 19, 2026, in Los Angeles, Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE: REXR), a real estate investment trust concentrating on industrial properties in Southern California, announced its commitment to investing and managing properties in the region. The company aims to enhance value through its operations in infill areas.

data.title: Rockefeller Foundation, Global Energy Alliance Invest more than US$100 Million to Expand Electricity in Africa
data.description: Mission 300 has raised its commitment from US$10 million to US$100 million across 23 countries. These countries include Benin, Burkina Faso, DRC, Chad, Côte d'Ivoire, Ethiopia, Kenya, Lesotho, Liberia, Madagascar, Malawi, Mauritania, Mozambique, Niger, Nigeria, Republic of Congo, Rwanda, Senegal, and Sierra Leone.

data.title: FedEx Reports Strong Third Quarter Results
data.description: FedEx Corp. released its third-quarter financial results for the period ending February 28. The company reported a revenue of $24.0 billion for fiscal year 2026, the same as fiscal year 2025. Operating income was $1.35 billion on a GAAP basis, and $1.62 billion on a non-GAAP basis. In comparison, for the prior year, operating income was $1.29 billion (GAAP) and $1.51 billion (non-GAAP). The operating margin for the current quarter was 5.6% (GAAP) and 6.7% (non-GAAP), slightly lower than the previous year's margin of 5.8%.
